reasoning: Koren, let's tackle your lactate clearance today. The 25W drop from your 5-min to 20-min power indicates this is key. Reflecting on your last ride, we need more intensity to prepare for the Alpine Loop's demanding climbs. Over-unders will train your body to clear lactate efficiently and build fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 x 8-min over-under intervals: 2 min at 218W, 2 min at 242W, 2 min at 218W, 2 min at 256W. 5 min Z2 recovery in between.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
